_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative Analysis Identifies Candidate Tumor Microenvironment and Intracellular Signaling Pathways that Define Tumor Heterogeneity in NF1.

_contextSnippet: This algorithm leverages previously published regulatory network information to infer protein activity in each sample to assign numerical scores of activity across 6168 proteins for each of the 77 samples... we observed five distinct clusters of latent variables with similar predicted protein activities
details: Successfully assigned numerical scores of activity across 6168 proteins for each of the 77 samples and identified five distinct clusters of latent variables with similar predicted protein activities
